eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 04:18 AM ON MAR 17, 2026 Effective until 12:18 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
A SAFE Alert has been issued for Gilbert Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Gilbert Police Department is looking for 15-year-old Mateo Villegas. He was last seen on March 16, 2026, when he left his home near Germann and Higley Roads around 6 PM, without his cell phone. Mateo is 5'6", 140 pounds, with black hair and brown eyes, and was last seen wearing a black t-shirt and black sweatpants, riding his skateboard with light-up wheels. 

If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
